name: I'm on a small island
hints: A small island with a skeleton - the remains of a previous explorer. Examine it carefully.
GET SKELETON or EXAM SKELETON for clues. Go NORTH for a grass hut and mountain, WEST for more island to explore.
The skeleton may have items on it. NORTH leads to the mountain and hut area (room 14), WEST to another part of the island with a shovel (room 18).
notes: Southern part of a small island with a skeleton. North leads to the hut/mountain area (room 14), west to another beach area with a shovel (room 18). The skeleton can be taken as an item.
